title: COLD EMAIL COPYWRITING & OUTREACH Full Course 2026
summary: Nick Saraev's "Cold Email Copywriting & Outreach Full Course 2026" is a multi-hour educational program covering the psychology of persuasion, copywriting frameworks, offer construction, platform-specific optimization (LinkedIn, X, SMS, Instagram), email subject lines, follow-ups, and AI integration. The course includes real-world cold email analysis and advanced outbound techniques.
